headlines.headline: Grevon Biotech reports rising costs pressuring margins in precision manufacturing

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs in precision manufacturing directly threaten profit margins, signaling a negative impact on financial performance.

headlines.headline: Plevik Energy misses quarterly revenue estimates by 15%

sentiment.reasoning: A significant 15% revenue miss relative to estimates indicates immediate operational or demand challenges for the company.

headlines.headline: Zelval Energy secures $400M contract with a leading cloud platform

headlines.headline: Zelval Energy secures $250M contract with a multinational manufacturer

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
